---
title: "Annelies de Haan"
---

::: {.profile-page}

::: {.profile-text}

## Data Analyst

General quantitative research methods, Complex quantitative research methods, Experimental research designs (Randomized Controlled Trials).

**E:** A.de.Haan [at] arq.org

[LinkedIn](#) | [ResearchGate](#)

:::

::: {.profile-photo}

![](../images/people/annelies.png)

:::

:::
